# Standardized Project Templates

This directory holds templates for architectural work, pull requests, and bug investigations.

## Templates List
1. [implementation_plan_template.md](file:///c:/Users/omar_/Desktop/Porfolio%20Tracker/docs/templates/implementation_plan_template.md) - Structure for drafting implementation plans.
2. [pr_template.md](file:///c:/Users/omar_/Desktop/Porfolio%20Tracker/docs/templates/pr_template.md) - Structure for pull request descriptions.
3. [investigation_template.md](file:///c:/Users/omar_/Desktop/Porfolio%20Tracker/docs/templates/investigation_template.md) - Structure for reporting debug and research findings.
